models.title: Modular Drone
models.description: A modular UAV platform. The design serves as a versatile baseline for DIY open-source drone builds, allowing users to modify and iterate on the structure while maintaining a reliable core architecture.

models.title: Simple Plate Heat Exchanger
models.description: A compact plate heat exchanger with a partially visible movable frame, revealing the internal stack of corrugated plates. The design creates alternating flow channels for efficient heat transfer between two fluids without mixing.

models.title: Simple Shell and Tube Heat Exchanger
models.description: Baseline model of a horizontal heat exchanger for thermal transfer applications.
